anti_patterns.title: Tier feature marked as missing its decision limit
anti_patterns.do_not: Present a tier feature without the quantity, usage boundary, or support limit needed to compare it.

anti_patterns.title: Pricing state marked as obscuring a suitable cheaper tier
anti_patterns.do_not: Use preselection, ordering, or visual pressure to conceal a cheaper tier that satisfies the buyer's stated needs.

anti_patterns.title: Renewal terms marked as hidden at conversion
anti_patterns.do_not: Hide billing cadence, renewal behavior, or material support boundaries from the tier's purchase decision.

anti_patterns.title: Feature names without decision-making limits
anti_patterns.do_not: List features without quantities, usage boundaries, or other limits that make tiers comparable.

good_bad.bad: Advanced analytics, with no scale or limit.

anti_patterns.title: Preselection hides a suitable cheaper tier
anti_patterns.do_not: Use default selection or visual pressure to obscure an option that fits the buyer's stated needs.

anti_patterns.title: Billing cadence and renewal terms hidden below conversion
anti_patterns.do_not: Place renewal, billing cadence, or material support limits where they are invisible at the purchase decision.
